files.notes: This file contains three biographical articles about women appointed to the General Board of the Relief Society. Each article is a complete biographical sketch with clear start and end boundaries.

files.notes: This file contains two distinct sections: 'Notes from the Field' by Amy Brown Lyman covering mission reports from various locations, and 'Guide Lessons for January' which includes the lesson course for 1928 with theology, literature, and social service lessons. The file also contains advertising content at the end which is part of the Guide Lessons section.
